description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that runs a global before_script installing curl, openjdk8 and bash via apk, downloads sbt‑1.1.6.tgz from https://piccolo.link, extracts it under /opt and removes the archive. Define a single stage called build and a build job that uses the docker:stable image, runs only on tag pipelines, and uses the docker:dind service with DOCKER_DRIVER=overlay2 and DOCKER_HOST=tcp://docker:2375/. In the build job execute the following script steps: prepend /root/bin,$SBT_HOME/bin and $JAVA_HOME/bin to PATH; cd /builds/boardcrew/instalador; set CONTAINER_VERSION=$(grep "version" build.sbt | cut -d \" -f2 | head -1); run sbt --error -mem 2000 docker:publishLocal; docker login -u ${REGISTRY_USERNAME} -p ${REGISTRY_PASSWORD}; docker tag instalador:${CONTAINER_VERSION} boardcrew/instalador:${CONTAINER_VERSION}; docker push boardcrew/instalador:${CONTAINER_VERSION}. The job is tagged with docker.
